mission.title: oras: add command to get the digest of a tagged manifest without parsing output
mission.description: add command to get the digest of a tagged manifest without parsing output. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current oras deployment
steps.description:
Verify your oras version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras
helm list -n oras 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working oras installation.

steps.title: Review oras configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant oras configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras
kubectl get configmap -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=oras
```
### What is the version of your ORAS CLI

1.0.0

### What would you like to be added?

Add a new command to get the digest of a tagged manifest as below:
```console
$ oras resolve -h
Resolves digest of the target artifact

Usage:
  oras resolve

steps.title: Apply the fix for add command to get the digest of a tagged manifest without…
steps.description:

**Examples**
- Resolve digest of `docker.io/library/hello-world:latest`

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras
kubectl get events -n oras --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "add command to get the digest of a tagged manifest without…" is functioning correctly.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with oras installed or the issue environment reproducible.
